allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://jor.myheavenbeauty.com" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://jor.myheavenbeauty.com" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell($env:COREPACK_HOME = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\corepack"; corepack pnpm@9.15.0 exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 60)
